Site Journal Brand Kit

Partnership · Great Britain Freediving

A GB athlete on a steep climb

Harry McCahill went from a Covid-lockdown hobby to the world's top ten in under two years — in the purest, most demanding discipline in the sport. A fast-rising British athlete, a coaching business as a built-in audience, and a story that markets itself.

Allie Reilly
The headline result
8th
in the world · Constant Weight No Fins, 2025. The strongest credibility anchor — in the discipline's purest form.
The timely hook
2026
Wild card to the AIDA Depth World Championships in Limassol, Cyprus — a televised, global stage.
01

Why partner with Harry

↗

Trajectory

Competing only since 2024 — already 8th in the world, the deepest no-fins diver in Britain, and three national records. The climb is the story.

◐

Visibility

A growing, visually stunning sport on televised international stages, with multi-platform content across Instagram, TikTok and YouTube.

∞

Built-in audience

An AIDA Master Instructor with a coaching business and 100+ certified students — an engaged community, not just a follower count.

Allie Reilly

About

Harry McCahill is a British competitive freediver, national record holder, and AIDA Master Instructor based in Dominica. After discovering the sport during the pandemic, he relocated to the Caribbean in 2022 to train full-time — and in 2025 finished 8th in the world in Constant Weight No Fins, the discipline's purest and most demanding form. The deepest no-fins diver in Britain and second-deepest in British history, he holds three CMAS national records and earned a wild card to the 2026 AIDA Depth World Championships in Limassol. Alongside competing, Harry coaches divers from beginner to competition level, grounded in relaxation, technique, and nervous-system control.

02

Proof points

  • 8th in the world in Constant Weight No Fins, 2025.
  • Deepest no-fins diver in the UK · 2024, 2025, 2026 — second-deepest in British history.
  • 3 CMAS national records held.
  • Personal bests: CWT 91m · FIM 90m · CWTB 85m · CNF 80m.
  • 2026 World Championships wild card · Limassol, Cyprus.
  • Competed for the UK at the 2024 CMAS World Championships.
  • Elite-event roles: safety diver, 2024 AIDA Worlds (Corsica); commentator, Vertical Blue 2023.
  • AIDA Master Instructor since 2021 · 100+ students certified across AIDA levels.
03

Founder, Co-Owner & Managing Director of Blue Element Freediving Inc, Dominica — a world-class training centre and host of an international competition.
